results.title: PayloadCMS Lexical Ext
results.description: Extended lexical editor features for Payload CMS (Text color, highlight, block background, embeds)

results.title: Payload Plugin Lexical
results.description: A Payload CMS plugin that adds a Lexical-based rich text editor, offering advanced features and a modern alternative to Slate.

results.title: Payload
results.description: Payload is an open-source, code-first Next.js fullstack framework and headless CMS providing an extensible admin panel, automatic database schema, APIs, authentication, and file management for modern web applications.

results.title: Payload
results.description: Payload is an open-source, code-first, full-stack TypeScript framework for Next.js. It provides instant backend superpowers like an admin panel, automatic database schema, REST/GraphQL APIs, authentication, and file storage, simplifying modern web app development.

results.title: Payload
results.description: Payload is the open-source, fullstack Next.js framework, giving you instant backend superpowers. Get a full TypeScript backend and admin panel instantly. Use Payload as a headless CMS or for building powerful applications.

results.title: Payload Lexical Typography
results.description: A plugin that extends Payload's Lexical editor with advanced text formatting options including color, font size, letter spacing, line height, and font family customization.

results.title: Payload CMS
results.description: The official Next.js website for payloadcms.com

results.title: Payload Lexical Nuxt Serializer
results.description: A Nuxt module that provides components for rendering rich text nodes and block fields from PayloadCMS's Lexical Editor, simplifying the process of displaying complex content structures in your Nuxt application.

results.title: Payload AI Plugin
results.description: Payload AI Plugin integrates modern AI capabilities into Payload CMS to streamline content creation and management, offering text generation, proofreading, translation, image and voice generation, prompt customization, access control, and custom model support.

results.title: Payload Sync Plugin
results.description: A real-time sync plugin for PayloadCMS offering reactive queries and optimistic mutations for instant UI updates and cross-client synchronization.

results.title: Payloads
results.description: A curated list of payloads for bug hunting, including personal and public contributions, to aid in your bug hunting journey.

results.title: Payload DB Postgres
results.description: The official Postgres adapter for Payload CMS, enabling seamless integration with PostgreSQL databases for your Payload projects.

results.title: Payloads All The Things
results.description: A comprehensive list of useful payloads and bypasses for Web Application Security, with contributions encouraged from the community.

results.title: Boost.Lexical_Cast
results.description: Boost.Lexical_Cast is a C++ library function template that offers a convenient and consistent way to perform common conversions between arbitrary data types and their textual representations.

results.title: Payload Auth.js
results.description: A Payload CMS 3 plugin for Auth.js/NextAuth 5

results.title: qs-esm
results.description: A modernized, esm-only fork of qs without unnecessary polyfills

results.title: Payload Auth
results.description: The easiest way to integrate your favorite auth providers into Payload CMS.

results.title: Payload CMS Cloudinary Plugin
results.description: A powerful plugin for Payload CMS that integrates Cloudinary as a storage adapter for media files, allowing seamless storage and management of media with enhanced support for custom fields, public IDs, and versioning.

results.title: Llama.cpp
results.description: Llama.cpp is a C/C++ project for efficient Large Language Model (LLM) inference on a wide range of hardware, featuring minimal setup, state-of-the-art performance, and support for various quantization methods and GPUs.

results.title: Lexical
results.description: Lexical is an extensible text editor framework that provides excellent reliability, accessibility and performance.

results.title: Payload DB MongoDB
results.description: The official MongoDB adapter for Payload CMS, enabling seamless integration with MongoDB databases for your Payload projects.

results.title: Microsoft MCP Servers
results.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is an open protocol that standardizes how applications provide context to large language models (LLMs), allowing AI applications to connect with various data sources and tools consistently.

results.title: Pgcli
results.description: Postgres CLI with autocompletion and syntax highlighting

results.title: Chargeblast (llmstxt)
results.description: Chargeblast provides an API for managing chargebacks, including fetching and updating alerts, creating credit requests, enrolling merchants, and syncing order data.

results.title: Plate
results.description: A rich-text editor powered by AI

results.title: Elixir LangChain
results.description: Elixir LangChain is a library for developing applications powered by large language models (LLMs) within the Elixir ecosystem, offering tools for custom function execution and AI model integration.

results.title: lcmm
results.description: lcmm is an R package designed for the estimation of extended mixed models, incorporating latent classes and latent processes for robust statistical analysis.
